tests.source_program:
define noundef range(i32 0, 5) i32 @test1(i32 noundef %v) {
start:
  %ctlz = tail call range(i32 0, 33) i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 %v, i1 false)
  %bit_width = sub nuw nsw i32 32, %ctlz
  %shifted = lshr i32 %bit_width, 3
  %masked = and i32 %bit_width, 7
  %cmp = icmp ne i32 %masked, 0
  %zext = zext i1 %cmp to i32
  %result = add nuw nsw i32 %shifted, %zext
  %check = icmp ugt i32 %shifted, 2
  %final = select i1 %check, i32 %result, i32 %shifted
  ret i32 %final
}

start:

  %bit_width = sub nuw nsw i32 32, %ctlz
  %shifted = lshr i32 %bit_width, 3
  %add = add nuw nsw i32 %bit_width, 7
  %result = lshr i32 %add, 3
  %check = icmp ugt i32 %shifted, 2
  %final = select i1 %check, i32 %result, i32 %shifted
  ret i32 %final
}

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define noundef range(i32 0, 5) i32 @test1(i32 noundef %v) {
start:
  %ctlz = tail call range(i32 0, 33) i32 @llvm.ctlz.i32(i32 %v, i1 false)
  %check = icmp ugt i32 %v, 8388607
  %final.v.v = select i1 %check, i32 39, i32 32
  %final.v = sub nuw nsw i32 %final.v.v, %ctlz
  %final = lshr i32 %final.v, 3
  ret i32 %final
}
